creator: wulf@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Jason W. Bacon from comment #7)
> why would behavior differ between 12.1-RELEASE and 12.2-RC2?
12.1-RELEASE still has kern.evdev.rcpt_mask=3 by default as it predates xorg-server 1.20 (wrongly mentioned by me as 1.21) import to ports tree. Really, X.Org version does not matter. Evdev-awared xorg autoconfiguration backend was added to server at the same moment, that changed its behavior. Old value of kern.evdev.rcpt_mask sysctl in 12.1-RELEASE just hided that for some time with forcing libinput to get touchpad events through mouse emulation support in psm(4) driver.
